parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ingested', document_id: $('Extract + Chunk Text').first().json.document_id, doc_key: $('Extract + Chunk Text').first().json.doc_key, version: $('Extract + Chunk Text').first().json.version, chunks: $('Extract + Chunk Text').all().length, point_ids: $('Extract + Chunk Text').all().map(i => i.json.point_id) }) }}
